allow: Bash(node -e "const gi = require\('react-icons/gi'\); const instruments = Object.keys\(gi\).filter\(k => /guitar|violin|banjo|mandolin|ukulele|bass|lute|music/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(instruments.join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const lu = require\('react-icons/lu'\); const icons = ['LuTrash2','LuUndo2','LuPencil','LuSave','LuDownload','LuCopy','LuMenu','LuFileText','LuChevronDown','LuChevronUp','LuPlus','LuGlobe','LuAlignJustify','LuFileDown','LuLayoutDashboard','LuRows3','LuListMusic','LuFileMusic','LuMusicIcon','LuPlusSquare','LuPanelBottomOpen'].filter\(k => lu[k]\); console.log\(icons.join\('\\n'\)\)")
